hero.description: India ke verified saree manufacturers se directly connect karo. Koi commission nahi, koi middleman nahi, better margins.

how.title: Kaise Kaam Karta Hai
how.step1_desc: Manufacturer ya wholesaler — 2 minute mein account banao, bilkul free.
how.step2_desc: LoomLink verified manufacturers ko wholesalers se seedha connect karta hai.
how.step3_desc: WhatsApp pe seedha manufacturer se deal karo. Zero brokerage, maximum profit.

why.title: LoomLink Kyun?
why.p1_desc: Manufacturer se seedha deal — commission zero, munafa zyada.
why.p2_desc: UP, Bihar, Gujarat ke wholesalers ab verified manufacturers se seedha kharid sakte hain.
why.p3_desc: Verified manufacturers, asli catalogs, transparent pricing.

listings.title: Featured Listings
listings.subtitle: Verified manufacturers — seedha contact, koi commission nahi
